settings.text: Eight years of building Portland's strongest community, one session at a time.
Started With a Barbell and a Vision

Olympic was founded in 2018 by two trainers who believed Portland deserved a gym built around coaching, not cardio machines. We started with 3,000 square feet and a handful of members. Today we train over a thousand athletes across six programs, but the mission has not changed: build a place where people get genuinely stronger, together.

settings.title: Community First
settings.description: Training is better together. We build genuine connections between members because accountability and camaraderie drive results that motivation alone cannot sustain.

settings.title: Discipline Over Hype
settings.description: No gimmicks, no shortcuts. We believe in progressive overload, consistent effort, and smart programming. The basics work when you commit to them.

settings.title: Results You Can Measure
settings.description: Every program is structured around measurable progress. We track, we adjust, and we celebrate when our members hit milestones they once thought impossible.

settings.title: Meet Our Coaches
settings.description: Every Olympic trainer holds nationally recognized certifications and brings years of hands-on coaching experience.

settings.name: Jason Reeves
settings.bio: CSCS certified with 12 years of coaching. Former collegiate powerlifter. Specializes in barbell programming and athletic performance.

settings.name: Maya Santos
settings.bio: NASM certified personal trainer and amateur boxing competitor. Runs Olympic's most popular HIIT and boxing classes.

settings.name: Tom Eriksen
settings.bio: CrossFit Level 3 trainer and USAW Sports Performance Coach. Competed in regional CrossFit events for six consecutive years.

settings.name: Priya Anand
settings.bio: RYT-500 certified yoga instructor with a background in physical therapy. Designs mobility programs for strength athletes.

settings.text: The trainers here genuinely care. Jason rebuilt my entire squat program after I came back from a knee injury, and now I'm stronger than before. You cannot get that at a chain gym.
settings.name: Alex Petrov
settings.title: Member for 4 years

settings.text: I joined for the boxing classes and stayed for the community. Priya's yoga sessions have done more for my recovery than years of foam rolling. Every coach here is the real deal.
settings.name: Nina Westbrook
settings.title: Member for 1 year

settings.text: Your first session is on us. See what real coaching feels like.
